name: faq
title: FAQ
description: Compound FAQ primitives (Root, Item, Question, Answer) over the shadcn Accordion. Defaults to the stock look; each part is stylable via class. Question exposes a swappable icon snippet + configurable rotate-on-open; Answer renders children (supports {@html}). Loop your own Q&A data over the items.

files.content:
<script lang="ts">
	import * as Accordion from '$lib/components/ui/accordion/index.js'
	import type { Snippet } from 'svelte'

	interface Props {
		type?: 'single' | 'multiple'
		value?: string | string[]
		class?: string
		children: Snippet
		[key: string]: unknown
	}
	let {
		type = 'single',
		value = $bindable(),
		class: className = '',
		children,
		...rest
	}: Props = $props()
</script>

<Accordion.Root {type} bind:value={value as never} data-slot="faq" class={className} {...rest}>
	{@render children()}
</Accordion.Root>

<script lang="ts">
	import * as Accordion from '$lib/components/ui/accordion/index.js'
	import type { Snippet } from 'svelte'

	interface Props {
		value: string
		class?: string
		children: Snippet
		[key: string]: unknown
	}
	let { value, class: className = '', children, ...rest }: Props = $props()
</script>

<Accordion.Item {value} data-slot="faq-item" class={className} {...rest}>
	{@render children()}
</Accordion.Item>
{@render children()} {#if icon} {@render icon()} {:else} {/if}

<script lang="ts">
	import * as Accordion from '$lib/components/ui/accordion/index.js'
	import type { Snippet } from 'svelte'

	interface Props {
		class?: string
		children: Snippet
		[key: string]: unknown
	}
	let { class: className = '', children, ...rest }: Props = $props()
</script>

<!-- Content renders `children`, so `<Faq.Answer>{@html item.description}</Faq.Answer>` works. -->
<Accordion.Content data-slot="faq-answer" class={className} {...rest}>
	{@render children()}
</Accordion.Content>

import Root from './faq.svelte'
import Item from './faq-item.svelte'
import Question from './faq-question.svelte'
import Answer from './faq-answer.svelte'

export { Root, Item, Question, Answer }
